name: Honey Chicken2
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup lemon juice, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 9x13-inch baking pan with cooking spray.
3. In a shallow bowl, mix together the flour, salt, pepper, and paprika; dip chicken into flour mixture.
4. Add the chicken pieces to the pan, then bake for 30 minutes, skin side down, in a single layer.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, mix together the sauce ingredients.
6. Turn the chicken, then cover with sauce.
7. Bake for 30 more minutes, or until the chicken is fork-tender and no pink remains.
8. Spoon the sauce over the chicken again and serve.
